data.description: The latest data shows that the global COVID-19 death toll has surpassed 5 million, with more than 240 million confirmed cases worldwide. Additionally, approximately 60% of the world's population has received at least one dose of a COVID-19 vaccine. In the United States, around 45 million cases and 730,000 deaths have been reported due to COVID-19. The country has administered over 390 million vaccine doses as part of its vaccination campaign. Despite these efforts, health officials remain vigilant as new variants continue to emerge.

data.title: Lucid Diagnostics Announces Closing of $18 Million Underwritten Offering of Common Stock
data.description: Today, in New York City on April 24, 2026, Lucid Diagnostics Inc. (Nasdaq: LUCD), a company specializing in cancer prevention medical diagnostics and a subsidiary of PAVmed Inc. (Nasdaq: PAVM), finalized the underwritten transaction as previously disclosed.

data.title: Master Sergeant Van Dyke charged for using military intel to profit over $400K on Polymarket bets related to Maduro's ouster.
data.description: Master Sergeant Gannon Ken Van Dyke is currently facing allegations of using military intelligence for personal gain, reportedly profiting over $400,000 through bets made on Polymarket related to the removal of Maduro.

data.title: HelloNation Outlines What to Consider Before Installing an Inground Pool, Featuring Pool & Landscaping Expert Tina Possehn Wolbers
data.description: A recent piece discusses essential factors like pool layout, material choice, and drainage strategy to ensure lasting satisfaction. Lansing, Michigan - On April 24, 2026, insights on crucial aspects to ponder prior to commencing an inground pool project are detailed in a publication by HelloNation, shedding light on key considerations for homeowners.

data.title: Actelis Networks Commences Trading on the OTCQB Venture Market
data.description: Starting from April 24, 2026, common stock under the symbol "ASNS" began trading on the OTCQB. The company is currently operating in federal, transportation, utilities, and telecom markets. Additionally, they are considering relisting on Nasdaq while still executing their business.

data.title: DOJ closes probe into Fed; Powell's handling of renovation won't be scrutinized. It clears the way for Trump's Fed chair choice.
data.description: The conclusion of the inquiry into Jerome H. Powell's management of the Federal Reserve's revamp means that Kevin M. Warsh, President Trump's nominee for the position of Fed chair, is more likely to secure approval.

data.title: Alpha Compute Corp. Provides GAMEE Acquisition Update; Closing Expected in May 2026 Pending Completion of GAMEE’s 2025 Financial Audit
data.description: Alpha Compute Corp. has released an update regarding their acquisition of GAMEE, stating that the closing of the deal is anticipated to occur in May 2026. This is pending the completion of GAMEE's financial audit for the year 2025. The acquisition process is progressing as planned and is expected to be finalized once the audit is successfully completed.

data.title: Qualcomm Stock Is Climbing In Sympathy With Intel's Q1 Results
data.description: Qualcomm Inc's (NASDAQ: QCOM) shares are surging due to a boost from Intel's exceptional first-quarter results. Qualcomm stock is showing strong momentum as a result. Intel Corp (NASDAQ: INTC) saw its shares rise in premarket trading following a robust quarter, with earnings per share at 29 cents, surpassing the one-cent estimate, and revenue totaling $13.58 billion, beating expectations and increasing from last year's $12.67 billion. This positive outcome is benefiting Qualcomm, as a stronger demand in the chip supply chain tends to uplift various players, even those in different markets. Intel's focus on AI and data centers is significant, with AI-related revenue now constituting 60% of its overall business and growing by 40% annually. The Data Center and AI segment specifically yielded $5.1 billion in revenue, up by 22% from last year and 7% sequentially, operating at a 31% margin. This development is crucial for Qualcomm's current performance.

data.title: Analyst predicts altcoins may surge by 60% if Bitcoin reaches $86K. Key levels and catalysts to watch for.
data.description: An analyst in the crypto market, Michael van de Poppe, forecasts that Bitcoin has the potential to reach $86,000 in value. This prediction has created anticipation for a substantial rally in altcoins, estimated to be between 30% to 60%. Van de Poppe also highlights the importance of key levels and upcoming catalysts that could impact the market.

data.title: Sivers Semiconductors AB Postpones Publication of Annual Report 2025 Amid Dual Listing Evaluation
data.description: The release of Sivers Semiconductors AB's (STO: SIVE) Annual Report 2025 from KISTA, Sweden, has been postponed due to an ongoing audit enhancement related to assessing the possibility of a dual listing on Nasdaq New York. The company disclosed this delay on April 24, 2026.
